name: China Automotive Interior Decoration Holdings Limited
summary: China Automotive Interior Decoration Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the manufacture and sale of nonwoven fabric products for use in automotive interior decoration and other parts in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. The company is also involved in the trade of rubber and food products. China Automotive Interior Decoration Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in Shatin, Hong Kong.
